chapter_title.ar: باب الصَّلَاةِ خَلْفَ مَنْ لَا يُقْتَدَى بِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 50 – The Salāt behind the one whom one does not follow with Non-Shias)

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/254)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/254)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) أَكُونُ مَعَ الْإِمَامِ فَأَفْرُغُ مِنَ الْقِرَاءَةِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَفْرُغَ قَالَ أَبْقِ آيَةً وَ مَجِّدِ اللَّهَ وَ أَثْنِ عَلَيْهِ فَإِذَا فَرَغَ فَاقْرَأِ الْآيَةَ وَ ارْكَعْ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya Al Attar, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Hassan Bin Ali Bin Fazzal, from Ibn Bukeyr, from Zurara who said

‘I said to Abu Abdullahasws, ‘I happen to be with the Imam, and I am free from the recitation before he is free (from it)’. Heasws said: ‘Withhold a Verse and Glorify Allahazwj and Laud upon Himazwj. So when he is free, recite the Verse and perform Rukū’.
en.sarwar: 1. Muhammad ibn Yahya al-‘ Attar has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from al-Hassan ibn Ali ibn Faddal from ibn Bukayr from Zurarah who has said the following: “I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ’In Salah (prayer) with an Imam I complete the recitation before he does.’ He (the Imam) said, ’Leave one verse, speak of the glory of Allah and praise Him and when he (the Imam) completes, read that verse, then perform Ruku’ (bowing down on one’s knees).”’
